prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年物理类最低位次分别为998→951→1159→1014→1110，整体在950–1160区间波动，2025年基准约1110名。近5年位次呈震荡走势，2024年曾回升至1014名 ，2025年又回落至1110名，近2年累计后移约96名；该校在辽宁省物理类招生计划2021–2023年均为29人，2024年增至30人，2025年增至31人；2026年计划 骤降至21人，较2025年缩招约32.3%，为近5年最大幅度缩减，竞争显著加剧。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 复旦大学为985工程、211工程、双一流建设高校，软科中国大学主榜排名第5（202 6年），属全国顶尖学府；复旦大学上海医学院作为其医学部，临床医学、基础医学等学科实力位居全国前列；2026年高考周期内复旦大学声誉评价偏负面，主 要涉及师德师风类事件，但未出现投档线断档或重大招生异常信号；抖音综合热度排名第4（高热），短视频曝光量大，报考关注度维持高位；复旦大学（含医 学院）第五轮学科评估中，临床医学A、公共卫生与预防医学A+、药学A、护理学A-、生物医学工程A-；招生专业覆盖临床医学（八年制/五年制）、口腔医学、医学试验班（预防 医学、药学、公管），均为A类学科支撑。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 临床医学2024–2026年持续高热推荐，口腔医学推荐，医学类专业整体报考热度维持高位；辽宁省2025年物理类 考生约14.3万人，2026年总考生约20万人，按近年物理类占比约72%估算约14.4万人，考生规模基本持平；省控线（物理类本科批）2025年367分，近年稳定。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综 合2026年招生计划大幅缩减32.3%这一核心因素，竞争将显著加剧，位次较2025年明显前移；学校顶尖层次与医学专业高热度的叠加效应进一步推高竞争烈度；声誉偏负面有轻微 抑制但影响有限。预测2026年最低位次约890名，区间783–997名。

major_tier_recommendation.tier_1:
一档（最难进）
- 临床医学（八年制临床医师班）
- 口腔医学（含卓越口腔医师班，含口腔医学-人工智能双学士学位）。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_2:
二档（中等）
- 临床医学（含卓越临床医师班）。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_3:
三档（相对好进）
- 医学试验班（预防医学、药学、公共事业管理）。
major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 位次在预测区间783–997名内，建议以二档临床医学（五年制）为主攻方向，一档八年制临床和口腔医学作为冲刺，三档医学试验班作为保底。位次明显优于区间下限（783名以 内）可重点冲刺八年制临床医学和口腔医学；位次接近区间上限（997名附近）应以三档医学试验班为主要目标。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Physics Category were 998 → 951 → 1159 → 1014 → 1110, fluctuating within the 950–1160 range, with a baseline of approximately 1110 in 2025. Rankings have shown a volatile trend over the past 5 years, rebounding to 1014 in 2024 but falling back to 1110 in 2025, with a cumulative backward shift of about 96 places in the last 2 years. The enrollment plan for Physics Category in Liaoning Province was 29 from 2021 to 2023, increased to 30 in 2024, and further to 31 in 2025. In 2026, the plan sharply drops to 21, a reduction of about 32.3% compared to 2025, the largest cut in the past 5 years, significantly intensifying competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Fudan University is a 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class university, ranking 5th in the 2026 Soft Science China University Main Ranking, making it a top-tier national institution. Fudan University Shanghai Medical College, as its medical division, has clinical medicine, basic medicine, and other disciplines ranked among the top in the country. During the 2026 college entrance examination cycle, Fudan University's reputation evaluation was slightly negative, mainly involving teacher ethics incidents, but no major admission cutoff anomalies or significant enrollment disruptions occurred. Its comprehensive Douyin popularity ranking is 4th (high heat), with high short video exposure and sustained high application attention. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Fudan University (including the medical college) achieved Clinical Medicine A, Public Health and Preventive Medicine A+, Pharmacy A, Nursing A-, and Biomedical Engineering A-. The enrollment majors include Clinical Medicine (8-year/5-year), Stomatology, and Medical Experimental Class (Preventive Medicine, Pharmacy, Public Administration), all supported by A-level disciplines.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Clinical Medicine has been highly recommended from 2024 to 2026, Stomatology is recommended, and medical majors overall maintain high application heat. In 2025, Liaoning Province had approximately 143,000 Physics Category examinees, and in 2026, the total examinees are about 200,000, with Physics Category accounting for roughly 72%, estimated at about 144,000, a similar scale. The provincial control line (Physics Category undergraduate batch) was 367 in 2025, stable in recent years.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the core factor of a 32.3% reduction in the 2026 enrollment plan, competition will significantly intensify, with rankings notably moving forward compared to 2025. The combination of the school's top-tier status and high popularity of medical majors further increases competition intensity. The slightly negative reputation has a mild suppressing effect but limited impact. The predicted minimum ranking for 2026 is approximately 890, with a range of 783–997.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Difficult)
- Clinical Medicine (8-Year Clinical Physician Program)
- Stomatology (including Outstanding Stomatologist Program, including Stomatology-Artificial Intelligence Dual Degree).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Moderate)
- Clinical Medicine (including Outstanding Clinical Physician Program).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easier)
- Medical Experimental Class (Preventive Medicine, Pharmacy, Public Administration).
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: Within the predicted range of 783–997, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 Clinical Medicine (5-year) as the main direction, with Tier 1 8-year Clinical Medicine and Stomatology as reach goals, and Tier 3 Medical Experimental Class as a safety option. If the ranking is significantly better than the lower bound (within 783), prioritize reaching for 8-year Clinical Medicine and Stomatology; if the ranking is near the upper bound (around 997), target Tier 3 Medical Experimental Class as the main goal.
